# Levodopa 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Levodopa 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Levodopa</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Levodopa 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Stalevo is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Parkinson's disease and end-of-dose motor fluctuations not stabilised on levodopa / dopa-decarboxylase (DDC)-inhibitor treatment.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>juvenile onset Parkinson disease 19A（99.7%）</li>
<li>hereditary late onset Parkinson disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>atypical juvenile parkinsonism（99.2%）</li>
<li>X-linked parkinsonism-spasticity syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>Rasmussen subacute encephalitis（99.1%）</li>
<li>PLA2G6-associated neurodegeneration（98.8%）</li>
<li>myelitis（98.5%）</li>
<li>hemiparkinsonism-hemiatrophy syndrome（98.3%）</li>
<li>transaldolase deficiency（98.2%）</li>
<li>Parkinson disease（98.1%）</li>
<li>parkinsonian-pyramidal syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>paralysis agitans, juvenile, of Hunt（98.0%）</li>
<li>fructose-1,6-bisphosphatase deficiency（97.8%）</li>
<li>progressive supranuclear palsy-corticobasal syndrome（97.6%）</li>
<li>Lewy body dementia（97.2%）</li>
<li>early-onset parkinsonism-intellectual disability syndrome（97.1%）</li>
<li>multiple system atrophy, parkinsonian type（97.0%）</li>
<li>postencephalitic Parkinson disease（96.6%）</li>
<li>X-linked intellectual disability-ataxia-apraxia syndrome（96.5%）</li>
<li>lethal infantile mitochondrial myopathy（96.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/levodopa/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
